summary: Comprehensive testing of P0-P1 new features: 1) Drag-and-drop image upload in admin 2) Integrated contact form for showcase properties. All features working correctly - 100% backend tests passed (14/14), frontend features fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Demo data initialized via /api/init-demo-data for showcase property testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New P0-P1 features fully tested: 1) Image upload via POST /api/upload/image works (PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF up to 10MB). Images served via GET /api/uploads/{filename}. Admin Site Images tab has drag-and-drop zones that trigger file inputs. 2) Showcase properties (is_showcase=true) show integrated contact form instead of booking widget. Contact form submits via POST /api/contact with name, email, phone, message, property_id. Success toast confirms submission.

image_upload_api.details: POST /api/upload/image accepts PNG, JPEG, WebP, GIF. Returns {success, url, filename}. Validates file type and size (10MB max)

image_serving_api.details: GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves uploaded images with correct content-type. Returns 404 for non-existent files

admin_site_images_tab.details: Tab 'Images du site' accessible. Shows 6 configurable images with drag-and-drop zones

admin_drag_drop_upload.details: File input triggers upload. Success toast shown. URL field updated with uploaded image path

showcase_property_detection.details: Property with is_showcase=true shows contact form instead of booking widget

showcase_contact_form_fields.details: Contact form has: name, email, phone, message fields with proper data-testid attributes

showcase_contact_form_submission.details: Form submission via POST /api/contact works. Success toast displayed: 'Votre demande a été envoyée'

contact_api_validation.details: API validates required fields (name, email, subject, message) and email format. Returns 422 for invalid data
